task_description: Transform the Quant-Ecosystem from investor demo skeleton to production-grade Google/Meta killer. Make the agentic moat real (connect agent tools to backends), fix security vulns, replace naive ML stubs with real service clients, wire real Federation/WebRTC/SMTP, and make all apps and services buildable and startable.

verification.summary: All gates pass after review fixes. typecheck: 153/153. lint: 123/123. build: 120/120. tests: 151/153 (2 pre-existing quantai failures). Audit: 0 high vulns. 7 review issues addressed in fix commit 47a8031.

commits: c1b1682 feat(agentic): connect all agent tools to real backends via HTTP client
69ac679 fix(security,quantdrive): resolve high audit vulns and upgrade storage to real S3
035eb6d feat(federation,quantmeet): wire real Matrix bridge and LiveKit SFU integration
f2594a3 feat(ml-pipeline,recommendations): connect naive ML implementations to real inference backends
b581cd3 feat(apps,services): add build configs to 4 apps and graceful shutdown to 2 services
47a8031 fix(security,reliability): address 7 review issues across SFU, storage, planner, memory, federation
